name: Monk Extra Attack + Hellish Rebuke + Flurry (Queue Integration)
description: Tests the pending action queue when a Hellish Rebuke damage reaction fires between a Monk's Extra Attacks (level 5). The Monk attacks Lyra (Warlock 3 with Hellish Rebuke). Extra Attack 1 hits — after damage, Lyra uses Hellish Rebuke as a reaction, dealing 2d10 fire to the Monk. The queued Extra Attack 2 then auto-promotes from the queue and executes. After the main action completes, the Monk uses Flurry of Blows as a bonus action against the adjacent Training Dummy (no HR, since Lyra used her reaction). Verifies: (1) HR fires correctly mid-Extra-Attack chain, (2) queued Extra Attack 2 proceeds after reaction resolves, (3) Flurry bonus action still functions after HR interruption, (4) Ki is spent, (5) action economy fully tracks.

actions.comment: Li Wei rolls 20 + 3 DEX = 23 initiative. Always goes first (Lyra max 19 with DEX 8, Dummy max 17 with DEX 4).
Extra Attack 1 of 2: main action unarmed strike on the warlock
Attack 1 damage: 5 + 3 = 8 bludgeoning. Lyra: 30 - 8 = 22 HP. Extra Attack 2 queued. HR damage reaction detected.
Wait for Lyra's Hellish Rebuke damage reaction. Queue holds: [reaction_pending, ATTACK(Extra Attack 2/2)].
Lyra uses Hellish Rebuke — 2d10 fire damage to Li Wei, DEX save DC 14 for half.
Extra Attack 2 (auto-promoted from queue after HR resolves): 14 + 6 = 20 vs AC 5 — hit!
Attack 2 damage: 4 + 3 = 7 bludgeoning. Lyra: 22 - 7 = 15 HP. Main action complete — queue fully drained.
Bonus Action: Flurry of Blows (1 Ki) targeting nearest monster (Training Dummy at x:30). Lyra cannot HR again — reaction spent.
Flurry strike 1 damage: 5 + 3 = 8 bludgeoning to Dummy. Flurry strike 2 queued. No HR (Lyra's reaction is spent).
Flurry strike 2 damage: 3 + 3 = 6 bludgeoning to Dummy. Flurry complete.
Verify Ki point was spent: 5 total - 1 (Flurry) = 4 remaining
Li Wei took fire from HR (2d10, DEX save DC 14 for half). Starts at 38 HP.
Lyra took 8 + 7 = 15 bludgeoning from two unarmed strikes. 30 - 15 = 15 HP remaining.
Li Wei ends his turn: Extra Attack (with HR interruption) + Flurry bonus action — full action economy used.
